programme.desc: Diane's furious when Sam enters her photo into the Miss Boston Barmaid contest, until she realises it'll give her the chance to denounce the event to the media.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra and Marie pressure Ray and Frank to join Robert at one of his therapy sessions. Instead, they head to the racetrack.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra invites her divorced parents over for Thanksgiving. When Ray walks in on them making love, he and Debra mistakenly assume that they're getting back together.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray's jealous when Marie starts treating Robert better than him.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: And the Dish Ran Away with the Spoon: In a double-length episode, Niles and Daphne discover that there's a price to pay for admitting their true love.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier begs Martin to take a tour of a senior citizens' home so that he can ask out its manager.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier's bootlicking routine backfires when he invites his new boss, a nouveau-riche internet millionaire, to his tastefully decorated home.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Channel 4's midday news summary.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programme.title: Matt Baker: Our Farm in the Dales
programme.desc: Matt gets to work on a set of stone steps for the paddock and helps beekeeper George transport some of the beehives to the high Dales for heather season.

programme.title: Countdown

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: In Portugal, Richard and Simon's bar relaunches after closing for a week. In Italy, a drought causes problems at Lisa and Paul's holiday lets. Plus: mattress mayhem in France.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The new run continues. Mark and Anne host at their Margate townhouse, where the atmosphere turns icy over ice cream at the beach thanks to one guest who can't forget about his own feedback.

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red
programme.desc: A motorist is stuck in his car, unable to move his legs, and may have suffered a serious spinal injury. A man in a hard-to-reach rural location has cut his leg with an angle grinder.

programme.title: Trauma Room One
programme.desc: A patient is sped into theatre after a devastating stroke. Lorna is rushed in for emergency surgery after breaking her back. A consultant neurosurgeon must act quickly to avoid paralysis.

programme.title: Friends
